General Documents.full_text:
ASSURED SHORTHOLD TENANCY AGREEMENT
Agreement Date: 22 August 2026
Landlord: Mx George Thomas Williams
Tenant(s): Mr Liam Patrick Murphy and Mr Callum David Hughes
Property: Flat 2, Harbour view, 9 Marine Parade, Brighton, BN2 1TL
Term Start: 1 September 2026
Term End: 31 August 2027
Monthly Rent: GBP 1,650
Deposit: GBP 1,650
CLAUSE 1 - NATURE OF TENANCY
This tenancy is an assured shorthold tenancy within the meaning of Section 19A of the
Housing Act 1988. Nothing in this agreement shall be taken to confer on the Tenant any
greater security of tenure than that provided under the Act.
CLAUSE 2 - PAYMENT OF RENT
The Tenant shall pay to the Landlord the sum of GBP 1,650 per calendar month payable
monthly in advance on the tirst day ot each month. Payment to be made by standing order
or bank transfer.
CLAUSE 3 - DEPOSIT
A deposit of GBP 1,650 shall be held under a government approved tenancy deposit scheme.
The deposit or balance remaining after lawful deductions shall be returned within 10 days
of the end of tenancy.
CLAUSE 4 - TENANT OBLIGATIONS
(a) To use the Property as a single private dwelling only. (b) To keep the Property clean
and in good condition. (c) To pay council tax and all utility bills during the tenancy.
(d) Not to sub-let or assign the tenancy. (e) Not to cause nuisance or annoyance to
neighbours. (f£) To allow the Landlord access for inspections with 24hrs notice. (g) To
report any disrepair promptly to the Landlord.
CLAUSE 5 - LANDLORD OBLIGATIONS
(a) To maintain the structure and exterior of the Property. (b) To ensure gas and
electrical satety certiticates are current. (c) To carry out repairs within a reasonable
time of notification. (d) To protect the deposit in an approved scheme within 30 days.
CLAUSE 6 - ENDING THE TENANCY
Either party may terminate this agreement by giving not less than two months written
notice. The Tenant shall return all keys and leave the Property in the condition recorded
in the inventory, fair wear and tear excepted.
Landlord Signature:
Tenant
